title: Generation queue refactor — cue/loop/stop/dual-engine state machine
description: Replace patch-over-patch cue/stop/status system with a single owned generation-state architecture: genId+engine-tagged events, cancellation tokens, server-reconcilable status, engine-scoped SSE, per-generation engine override (cloud toggle) driving dependent UI (model selector). Subsumes stuck LOADING MODEL/STARTING repro (2026-07-06) and prior patches MPI-73/74/156/157/195/203/206.
